message:
fix(doctor): Use category+item for precise check lookup

The buildRecommendedActions function was using only the `item` field to
find checks, which could match incorrectly since multiple checks can
share similar item names. This fix uses both `category` and `item`
fields for unambiguous matching:

- Global storage check: category="Global Storage (~/.cass-memory)",
  item="Structure"
- Repo check: category="Repo .cass/ Structure", item="Structure"
- Sanitization check: category="Sanitization Pattern Health",
  item="Pattern Health"

This prevents false matches when check items have generic names like
"Structure" or "Pattern Health" that appear in multiple categories.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
